title: carex × ploegii
intro: Carex × ploegii, also known as Ploeg's sedge or Ploeg's sedge grass, is a hybrid plant species within the Carex genus, typically found in wetland areas. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, which include antitumor, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Carex × ploegii include potential uses in treating cancer, reducing inflammation, and protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in traditional medicine, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
